text.text:
✅ *Blog Post:* <{{ $json.link || '#' }}|{{ $('Parse AI Content').first().json.blog_title }}> ({{ $('Parse AI Content').first().json.publish_status }})
✅ *Twitter Thread:* {{ ($('Parse AI Content').first().json.twitter_thread || []).length }} tweets ready
✅ *LinkedIn Post:* {{ ($('Parse AI Content').first().json.linkedin_post || '').substring(0, 100) }}...
✅ *TikTok Hooks:* {{ $('Parse AI Content').first().json.tiktok_hooks_str }}
✅ *Email Snippet:* Ready

*SEO Keywords:* {{ ($('Parse AI Content').first().json.seo_keywords || []).join(', ') }}
*Cost:* ${{ $('Parse AI Content').first().json.estimated_cost_usd }} | *Tokens:* {{ $('Parse AI Content').first().json.tokens_used }}

parameters.responseBody: ={ "status": "error", "message": "episode_title is required, plus either transcript (>50 chars) or episode_url.", "received": { "episode_title": {{ JSON.stringify($('Set Inputs').first().json.episode_title) }}, "has_transcript": {{ $('Set Inputs').first().json.has_transcript }}, "episode_url_length": {{ $('Set Inputs').first().json.episode_url.length }} } }

_meta.author: AI Automation Expert
credentials_needed: WordPress Application Password (in payload: wp_url, wp_username, wp_app_password)

sample_request.transcript: (optional — paste full transcript here to skip Whisper)
sample_request.episode_title: How I 10x'd My Revenue with AI Automation
sample_request.target_audience: SaaS founders and digital agency owners

outputs_per_run.blog_post: 800-1000 word SEO blog post published to WordPress
